subjects.description: herds of cattle and sheep grazing in a mountain pasture
subjects.appearance_details: white sheep, brown and black cattle, sturdy bodies, woolly coats, grazing heads, slow walking, and small groups spread across the field
subjects.relationship: living foreground and midground animals occupying the pasture below the mountain
subjects.location: green pasture at the base of the snow-capped mountain
subjects.relative_size: small to medium animals against an immense landscape
subjects.orientation: mostly facing down to graze or moving gently across the meadow
subjects.pose: standing, grazing, walking, and resting in scattered groups
subjects.action: graze peacefully, shift positions, flick tails, and move slowly through the grass
subjects.state_changes: a few animals lift their heads; small groups drift across the pasture; grass bends under hooves
subjects.age: mixed adult livestock with a few young animals
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: wool, hide, fur, and natural animal coats with sunlit texture
subjects.facial_features: soft muzzles, ears, horns on some cattle, and grazing profiles

subjects.description: majestic snow-capped mountain above the pasture
subjects.appearance_details: towering rocky peak, bright snow crown, shaded cliffs, distant ridgelines, and crisp alpine air
subjects.relationship: dominant background landmark framing the pasture scene
subjects.location: background rising behind the green meadow
subjects.relative_size: colossal compared with animals and pasture plants
subjects.orientation: vertical peak centered behind the field, slopes spreading outward
subjects.action: holds steady while clouds drift and sunlight warms the lower slopes
subjects.state_changes: cloud shadows move lightly; snow highlights brighten; pasture foreground gains warm glow
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: snow, exposed rock, alpine grass, and distant mist textures

background_setting: A lush alpine pasture unfolds beneath a snow-capped mountain, with green grass, wild plants, grazing cattle and sheep, a distant brook, clean horizon, and crisp mountain air.

lighting.conditions: Warm sunlight washes the meadow while cooler blue-white light remains on the snowy summit, creating clean alpine contrast and soft animal shadows.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm sunlight washes the meadow while cooler blue-white light remains on the snowy summit, creating clean alpine contrast and soft animal shadows.

aesthetics.composition: Pastoral calm, expansive mountain grandeur, fresh air, natural abundance, bright green pasture, white livestock forms, and tranquil rural beauty.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Pastoral calm, expansive mountain grandeur, fresh air, natural abundance, bright green pasture, white livestock forms, and tranquil rural beauty.

cinematography.camera_motion: Long scenic shot with a slow lateral glide across the meadow, layered depth from foreground grass to animals to mountain, and gentle telephoto compression.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic alpine nature and pastoral text-to-video.
artistic_style: Cinematic landscape realism with warm pastoral color, crisp mountain detail, and peaceful animal motion.
context: At the foot of a majestic snow-capped mountain, cattle and sheep graze across a rich green pasture while sunlight reveals the freshness of the alpine scene.

actions.description: A long shot reveals the snow-capped mountain towering above a green pasture dotted with cattle and sheep.
The herds graze and drift slowly while the camera glides across grass, wild plants, and a distant brook line.
Warm sunlight intensifies on the meadow as a few animals lift their heads beneath the bright alpine peak.

segments.description: Establish the full mountain pasture with snow peak, green field, and scattered livestock.
segments.key_changes: The camera reveals the landscape scale and animals become readable as white and dark forms.
segments.camera: Wide long shot with slow forward-lateral drift.

segments.description: Move across the pasture as cattle and sheep graze, tails flick, and grass ripples in the breeze.
segments.key_changes: Animal movement becomes clearer, foreground plants pass by, and brook ambience is suggested.
segments.camera: Low telephoto glide with foreground grass parallax.

segments.description: Hold the serene alpine vista as sunlight warms the animals and lower slopes.
segments.key_changes: Meadow highlights brighten and a few animals lift their heads toward the camera.
segments.camera: Stable scenic hold with slight push toward the herds.

temporal_caption: Cattle and sheep graze peacefully in a lush pasture beneath a majestic snow-capped mountain glowing in warm sunlight.
audio_description: Soft wind over grass, distant brook water, sheep bleats, cattle lowing, light hoof steps, and open alpine ambience.
